results.justification: EXACT TWIN — capability basin + Gaussian-augmented optimizer + worst-case sharpness analysis IS the basin-stability 4-fold cycle + non-attachment regularizer mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — SPAM momentum reset on spike + optimizer state clearing IS the periodic dissolution-reset cycle mechanism.
Training stability + spike detection + recovery + restart criteria overlaps with periodic dissolution reset mechanism.
Loss-curve collapse + universal trajectory + hyperparam alignment overlaps with 4-fold cycle convergence mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — layer-wise FFN+head redistribution via linear interpolation IS the deity-first top-to-bottom layered reset mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — zapping procedure + re-init final-layer weights + sequential adaptation IS the deity-first top-layer dissolution reset mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Flat-LoRA + flat-basin sharpness-aware low-rank IS the basin-stability non-attachment regularizer mechanism.
Sharpness-aware + linear mode connectivity + flatter loss landscape overlaps with non-attachment + larger basin radius mechanism.
